hooks.name: Pre-Write Conformity Check
hooks.description: Verify file changes follow project standards before writing

action.prompt: Before making this change, check it against the standards in .kiro/steering/contributor-guide.md (naming, file location, shared utilities, CDK requirement, no hardcoded regions) and .kiro/steering/solution-adoption-tracking.md (tracking in app file). If the change would violate a standard, flag it and suggest the compliant approach.
